welcomeParagraph1: Fire Team Security, Inc. is a system integrator offering service and installation for our commercial customers. Our vertical of operation ranges from commercial, industrial, government agencies, and energy field operations throughout the western United States.
welcomeParagraph2: One of our primary goals is to bring the latest in technology and products to our customers by way of direct contact with our customers and security equipment distributors. We offer design services to all of our customers.
welcomeParagraph3: Our team is comprised of a group of individuals with over 40 years of fire and security industry experience. Our account managers and technicians continuously spend time on industry education and learning new technologies.
integratorHeading: We Are the Best Security Integrator
integratorDescription: With over 35 years of experience, Fire Team Security has helped hundreds of clients find the perfect security solution for their organization. With leading brands like Avigilon, Siemens, DMP, and many more, Fire Team Security has the tools to assist with any size project.
bannerText: You Always Get the Best Guidance
